reviews.author: Masami (Google)
reviews.summary:
reviewer pointed out that the __event_in_*irq() helpers do not handle the case where the event is triggered from a non-IRQ context, and suggested adding a check to ensure the current task is in an IRQ context before calling the helper

Reviewer Masami suggested reusing the common_pid field in the mm_vmscan_reclaim_pages tracepoint to save space, pointing out that all entries already store current->pid in this field.
